name: KPatch-Next Community KPM Repository
description: Community-maintained KPM modules including anti-detection suite

modules.name: SELinux Hook
modules.author: community
modules.description: SELinux access filter for Magisk context

modules.name: Stealth: proc-maps-hide
modules.author: kpatch
modules.description: Hide KPM/root paths from /proc/*/maps and /proc/*/smaps. Defeats the Duck Detector Memory card by removing hook-like executable mappings and loader artifacts from process memory listings.

modules.name: Stealth: mount-hide
modules.author: kpatch
modules.description: Hide Magisk/KSU/APatch mount points from /proc/mounts, /proc/self/mountinfo, and /proc/self/mountstats. Defeats the Duck Detector Mount card by removing root-related mount entries.

modules.name: Stealth: selinux-context-faker
modules.author: kpatch
modules.description: Report normal SELinux context to apps via /proc/self/attr/current and /sys/fs/selinux/enforce. Hides root process labels from apps that probe SELinux status.

modules.name: Stealth: boot-state-spoofer
modules.author: kpatch
modules.description: Report locked/green bootloader state to user-space. Rewrites androidboot.verifiedbootstate and ro.boot.vbmeta.digest so apps see a 'locked' device even when the bootloader is unlocked.

modules.name: Stealth: module-name-hider
modules.author: kpatch
modules.description: Replace KP/Magisk/KSU module names in /proc/modules with generic driver names (snd_timer, uvcvideo, wlan, etc.). Defeats the Native Root card by making root modules look like normal kernel drivers.

modules.name: Stealth: linker-redaction
modules.author: kpatch
modules.description: Stricter /proc/*/maps filter that drops anonymous executable regions with inode=0. Defeats loader-runtime-artifact detection when proc-maps-hide alone isn't enough.
